directory_structure.purpose: skill contract for AccentOS skill router
AirlockGate runtime: preflight, intercept-read, intercept-write, router hook, network block
scaffold template emitted on skill install

implementation_phases.title: Policy schema and scaffold
implementation_phases.validation: AccentOS git pre-commit hook validates every airlock/<skill>/policy.yaml against policy.schema.json

implementation_phases.title: AirlockGate preflight
implementation_phases.validation: session-start integration test loads a fixture skill missing policy and asserts preflight aborts

implementation_phases.title: Filesystem interception and ledger
implementation_phases.validation: fixture skill performs read+write; ledger contains expected entries and shadow directory contains redirected writes

implementation_phases.title: Router and network hooks
implementation_phases.validation: fixture skill triggers another skill and attempts an outbound fetch; ledger records propagation chain and network-block violation

implementation_phases.title: Operator slash commands
implementation_phases.validation: /airlock promote without --reason flag is rejected; with --reason flag flips status and appends promotion-log.md entry

implementation_phases.title: Documentation and skill registration
implementation_phases.validation: AccentOS skill router can resolve airlock by trigger phrase and slash command in a smoke session

validation_gates.passes_if: policy passes JSON Schema validation in git pre-commit hook
writer rejects non-append modes and is verified by ledger.test.js
skill without policy.yaml fails to load and emits policy-missing error
command rejects without --reason and writes promotion-log.md entry with reason
integration test asserts gate.js declared SDK_VERSION matches AccentOS skill SDK version

operating_rules: Every quarantined skill runs through AirlockGate.preflight before any other code executes in the session
policy.yaml is treated as source of truth; runtime state is reconstructed from policy plus ledger on demand
ledger writes are buffered in memory and flushed once at run end
compiled policy is cached in memory at session start
AccentOS-shipped skills are exempt from quarantine and skip AirlockGate hooks
Promotion mid-run takes effect on the next run; the current run finishes under quarantined policy

next_phases.trigger: any quarantined skill needs to run shell commands
next_phases.scope: extend AirlockGate with shell-command interceptor and add policy.yaml.shell_allowlist

next_phases.trigger: operator reports policy authoring exceeds five minutes per skill
next_phases.scope: introduce wildcard support and a policy-author wizard

next_phases.trigger: any single skill ledger exceeds 1 MB
next_phases.scope: monthly archive rotation with sha-pinned promotion-log.md cross-references
ledger sha attestation captured at promotion time
